titles.title: Can't You See Why I'm Happy

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We know that the end is nearing And time is growing so short, That God has promised a message And promised his word to restore, The restoring is now in progress, The Bride is accepting His word, Her heart is been turned to Her father, The Voice Of God She has heard.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Can't you see why I'm happy I've accepted the word of the Lord The Revealed Word that was spoken By the Prophet of Malachi four.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This world has rejected his promise The word they're already denied That god has favor his chosen The elected of this message will find We're waiting now for the rapture Will change in the twinkling of an eye We'll be cought up to meet our master We'll bid this old world goodbye.
